# DMRC — erkamdemirci.com

> DMRC is Erkam Demirci's software studio in Bursa, Türkiye, working worldwide.
> It designs and builds websites, mobile apps, and custom software — end to end,
> by one founder who runs design, code, launch, and maintenance himself.

Primary language: Turkish (canonical at /). English mirror at /en.

## Pages

- [Home (TR)](https://erkamdemirci.com/): the studio, its three crafts (websites,
  mobile apps, custom software), how it works, and the founder.
- [Home (EN)](https://erkamdemirci.com/en)
- [Services (TR)](https://erkamdemirci.com/hizmetler): web design & development,
  corporate websites, mobile apps, brand identity & design systems — with FAQ.
- [Services (EN)](https://erkamdemirci.com/en/services)
- [Contact (TR)](https://erkamdemirci.com/iletisim): brief → written quote within
  48 hours. Email: hello@erkamdemirci.com
- [Contact (EN)](https://erkamdemirci.com/en/contact)
- [Blog (TR only)](https://erkamdemirci.com/blog): guides on corporate websites,
  web costs, mobile app process, SEO, Core Web Vitals, and design systems.

## Facts

- Founder: Erkam Demirci — full-stack developer & UI designer.
- Location: Bursa, Türkiye; serves clients worldwide (TR + EN).
- Response time: written reply within 48 hours on working days.
- Stack: Next.js, Expo, Convex.
